title: Chat panel context awareness: header label + module-aware system prompt + retrieval fallback

steps.description: Backend: extend orch/rag/qa.py — module block in system prompt, unfiltered retrieval fallback when module-filtered search yields zero chunks, retrieval-note signal
Code review: S01 (qa.py module context + fallback)
API: extend QARequest with optional module_name; forward to QAEngine.answer_stream
Code review: S03 (code_qa.py QARequest + router wiring)
Frontend: chat header label sync (Chat — <path> (<name>) / Chat — Architecture), data-module-name on #code-content-root, module-detail fragment propagation, composer module_name payload
Code review: S05 (templates + static chat JS)
Tests: unit tests for _build_system_prompt branches + fallback; integration tests for QARequest module_name round-trip
Code review: S07 (test coverage vs. acceptance criteria)
Final cross-agent review: backend/API/frontend/tests integration, AC coverage, no regressions in chat panel
Fix CRITICAL and HIGH findings from S09
QV: Browser verification — verify chat header updates on module navigation and chat replies reference the selected module in an isolated worktree stack
